rationale: Both blocking findings fully resolved. CR-001: emailSlug exported from report-generator.ts and imported in session-report.ts; inline regex chain removed; test mock updated. || undefined applied in analytics/index.ts (cfg.userEmail || undefined) and BaseAgentAdapter.ts (profileConfig.userEmail || undefined), normalising both null and empty-string to undefined.
